display.purpose: Brand marks and identity moments only. There is deliberately no large on-page heading; the cover art is the hero.

numeric.purpose: Track indices and columnar numbers. Always tabular-nums.

title.purpose: Track titles; the loudest text on the page.

label.purpose: Column headers and form labels. Bold and small, never uppercase-tracked.

mono.purpose: Literal terminal content only: CLI commands quoted verbatim. The machine's own voice.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for background, color, and transform state changes.

motion.name: ease-float
motion.purpose: The floaty lift: artwork scale and border heat on hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Eclipse Gold action button; the one sun on the screen.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: all 150ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #f5b800); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(245 184 0 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary, #f5b800); color: var(--primary-foreground, #151006); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgb(245 184 0 / 80%); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action; Dust Line border over translucent Tape Black.
components.css: .ds-btn-o { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(208 185 144 / 16%)); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: rgb(23 22 17 / 30%); color: var(--foreground, #f4ead7); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: all 150ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-btn-o:hover { background: var(--muted, rgb(208 185 144 / 10%)); } .ds-btn-o:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-o:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #f5b800); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(245 184 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-g { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, #f4ead7); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: all 150ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-btn-g:hover { background: rgb(208 185 144 / 10%); } .ds-btn-g:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-g:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #f5b800); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(245 184 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Tape Black field with an Eclipse Gold focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Camo & Crooked or https://open.spotify.com/track/..." />
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2.5rem; width: 100%; padding: 0 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(208 185 144 / 16%)); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--input, #171611); color: var(--foreground, #f4ead7); font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #f5b800); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(245 184 0 / 40%); }

components.name: Track Row
components.description: The signature component: one track, one link to Spotify. Hover washes it in Gold Veil, heats the index, scales the artwork, drifts the caret.
components.html: #42Mind ProjectionCamo & Krooked, Mefjus4 Jun
components.css: .ds-track-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 3rem 3.25rem minmax(0, 1fr) 6.75rem 1.25rem; align-items: center; gap: 0.9rem; min-height: 5.25rem; padding: 0.95rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(208 185 144 / 12%); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; outline: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-track-row:hover, .ds-track-row:focus-visible { background: var(--accent, rgb(245 184 0 / 10%)); } .ds-track-row:focus-visible { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px var(--ring, #f5b800); } .ds-track-index { color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); font-family: Oxanium, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-track-row:hover .ds-track-index { color: var(--accent-foreground, #ffd057); } .ds-track-art { display: block; width: 3.25rem; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(208 185 144 / 16%); background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgb(245 184 0 / 18%), rgb(255 107 87 / 12%)), rgb(208 185 144 / 10%); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-track-row:hover .ds-track-art { transform: scale(1.06); border-color: rgb(245 184 0 / 42%); } .ds-track-meta { min-width: 0; display: block; } .ds-track-title { display: block; color: var(--foreground, #f4ead7); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.02rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-track-artist { display: block; margin-top: 0.34rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-track-date { justify-self: end; color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1; } .ds-track-caret { color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); transition: transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-track-row:hover .ds-track-caret { transform: translateX(2px); }

components.name: Playlist Shell
components.description: The glass pane that holds the tracklist: Sleeve Black at 48% with 18px backdrop blur over the cover-art sky.
components.html:
TrackAdded
Rows go here, separated by Dust Line borders.
components.css: .ds-shell { border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(208 185 144 / 16%)); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: rgb(16 16 13 / 86%); overflow: hidden; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } @supports (backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) { .ds-shell { backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(125%); background: rgb(16 16 13 / 48%); } } .ds-shell-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 3rem 3.25rem minmax(0, 1fr) 6.75rem 1.25rem; gap: 0.9rem; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(208 185 144 / 16%)); color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 800; } .ds-shell-body { padding: 0.95rem 1rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, #b7ab95); font-size: 0.9rem; }

components.name: CLI Command
components.description: Literal terminal content in a quiet box with a themed thin scrollbar and copy action.
components.css: .ds-cli-command { display: block; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; background: var(--secondary, #171611); border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(208 185 144 / 16%)); border-radius: 0.5rem; color: var(--foreground, #f4ead7); font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5; white-space: nowrap; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: rgb(208 185 144 / 16%) transparent; }

components.name: Cover Frame
components.description: The identity anchor: a glass mat around the cover art tinted by the eclipse (gold-to-red gradient under 16px blur).
components.css: .ds-cover-frame { width: 12rem; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid rgb(245 184 0 / 40%); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgb(245 184 0 / 24%), rgb(255 107 87 / 20%)); } @supports (backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) { .ds-cover-frame { backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(125%); background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgb(245 184 0 / 14%), rgb(255 107 87 / 12%)); } } .ds-cover-art { aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, #f5b800 0%, #c2410c 18%, #1a0f08 45%, #090a0b 100%); }

narrative.overview: This music projects your mind out into the cosmos: another dimension, a parallel universe. The cover art is the founding document of the system: a figure floating up out of the tower blocks into a starfield, tethered to a Discman by a headphone cable, under a burning eclipse. The mood is awe and melancholy at once, 'where did we come from' and 'where do we go', floaty, atmospheric, transcending. Never nihilist, never cold; the dark is warm and inhabited, the way a city night is. The interface is a carefully kept playlist, not a marketing page. The cover art literally sits behind every screen, and the UI is built as translucent panes over it: you are always looking through the interface into the cosmos. Eclipse Gold is the single light source. There are no heroes, no metrics, no pitch; the tracklist IS the page.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-only; the cover-art starfield shows through every surface
One light source: Eclipse Gold for the primary action, focus, and identity
Glass as doctrine, not decoration; depth from translucency, never shadows
Oxanium speaks for the brand (numerals, marks); the system sans does the reading
Floaty and tactile: hovers lift gently, presses land

rules.name: The One Sun Rule
rules.body: Eclipse Gold is the single light source. It appears as the primary action, the focus ring, and identity moments, and on no more than roughly 10% of any screen. Two gold elements competing in one view means one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Warm Dark Rule
rules.body: Every black and every neutral leans warm (toward the cream/dust hue). Cool grays and blue-tinted darks are prohibited; the night sky of this cosmos is warm and inhabited.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Oxanium speaks only for the brand and the numbers. If body copy or a paragraph is set in Oxanium, it's a mistake.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Every number that sits in a column (indices, dates) is tabular-nums. Numbers that jitter on update break the instrument-panel calm.

rules.name: The Through-the-Glass Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are windows onto the cosmos. A surface that fully occludes the backdrop (opaque, blurless) must justify itself; a surface with a drop shadow is prohibited outright.

rules.name: The One Pane Rule
rules.body: Glass does not stack on glass. Every pane sits directly on the cosmos, never on another pane (PRODUCT.md bans 'glassy card stacks' by name); content inside a pane sits flat on it. The cover frame, the playlist shell, and the nerd card are each panes; none of them nest.

rules.name: The Legible Sky Rule
rules.body: Text never sits on the raw backdrop. Every text surface is a pane that dims what it covers enough to hold WCAG AA (4.5:1 for body text), even where the burning sun sits behind the glass. If a bright backdrop region breaks contrast, the pane gets more opaque, not the text dimmer.

dos: Do keep the cover-art backdrop visible through every major surface; it is the design (The Through-the-Glass Rule).
Do reserve Eclipse Gold (#f5b800) for the primary action, focus ring, and identity moments; roughly 10% of any screen, no more (The One Sun Rule).
Do set every columnar number (indices, dates) in Oxanium tabular-nums (The Tabular Rule).
Do make hovers float and presses land: 1.06 artwork scale, 2px caret drift, 1px button press-down, all at 150-180ms ease-out.
Do ground every float under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce: color-only transitions, with the Gold Veil wash carrying the feedback.
Do keep body text at WCAG AA (4.5:1) against what is actually behind it, glass included (The Legible Sky Rule).
Do keep all neutrals warm; tint blacks and grays toward the cream/dust hue (#d0b990 family), never blue (The Warm Dark Rule).
Do put the music first on every surface: artist, title, date, note, and the Spotify open action before anything else.
donts: Don't build SaaS dashboards, bright streaming-app clones, or generic landing-page hero sections (PRODUCT.md anti-references, verbatim).
Don't write oversized marketing copy; there is no pitch, the tracklist is the page.

Don't stack glassy cards or add decorative gradients that ignore the cover art; panes sit on the cosmos, never on each other, and every gradient must derive from the eclipse palette (The One Pane Rule).
Don't use box-shadows for depth; depth is what shows through the glass.
Don't set body copy in Oxanium (The One Voice Rule), and don't add uppercase-tracked eyebrow labels; labels are bold and small, not tracked-out.
Don't introduce a light theme, cool grays, or a second accent hue; the system is dark-only with one sun.
